parameters.responseBody: ={"status":"error","code":429,"message":"Too many requests. Please wait 60 seconds before trying again."}
={"status":"error","code":401,"message":"Unauthorized. Valid API key required in Authorization header."}
={"status":"error","code":400,"message":"Invalid request. Required fields: text (symptoms), sessionId, patientEmail"}

options.systemMessage:
You are a medical triage assistant for a hospital.
After the patient answers your follow-up questions, analyze all information from the conversation history and output EXACTLY ONE of the following specialist names and nothing else:

Available specialists:
- Dermatologist (skin conditions)
- Cardiologist (heart and cardiovascular issues)
- Neurologist (brain and nervous system)
- ENT (ear, nose, throat)
- Gastrologist (digestive system)
- Endocrinologist (hormones and metabolism)
- Gynecologist (women's health)
- Orthopedic (bones, joints, muscles)
- General Physician (general health issues)
- Pediatrician (children's health)
- Psychologist (mental health)

Your final response must be EXACTLY ONE of these specialist names and NOTHING ELSE. No explanation, no additional text, just the specialist name.

parameters.responseBody: ={"status":"error","code":422,"message":"Unable to determine appropriate specialist. Please describe your symptoms in more detail."}
={"status":"error","code":503,"message":"AI assessment unavailable. Please consult a doctor directly or call emergency services if urgent."}

parameters.subject: =⚠️ URGENT: Medical Emergency Alert - Medilens
parameters.message:
=⚠️ Important Medical Notice ⚠️

Dear Patient,

Your symptoms have been assessed and require prompt medical attention.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🏥 SPECIALIST ASSESSMENT: {{ $json._specialistName }}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📋 DIAGNOSIS
{{ $json.diagnosis }}

🚨 WHY THIS IS URGENT
{{ $json.emergencyReason }}

🩹 IMMEDIATE FIRST AID
{{ $json.firstAid }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ NEXT STEPS
1. Visit the nearest emergency department immediately
2. Call local emergency services if symptoms worsen
3. Book an appointment: {{ $json._bookingUrl }}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This is an automated notification from Medilens Hospital.
If you have already sought medical care, please disregard this message.

Session ID: {{ $json._sessionId }}

parameters.subject: =🚨 CRITICAL: Patient Emergency Alert - {{ $json._specialistName }} Case

}) }}
